title: Odisha Burning Under Extreme Heat | No Water Booths In Keonjhar Sparks Anger - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
ଜଳୁଛି ଓଡ଼ିଶା | କଲବଲ କରୁଛି ଅସହ୍ୟ ତାତି | ନା ଅଛି ଜଳଛତ୍ର, | ନା ଟ୍ରାଫିକ୍ ପୋଷ୍ଟରେ ଅଛି ସେଡ୍
ଛଟପଟ ପଥଚାରୀ
Odisha is reeling under unbearable heatwave conditions, and the situation in Keonjhar town has become extremely painful for common people. Hundreds of pedestrians and daily commuters are struggling in the scorching sun without access to drinking water, shade, or relief facilities.
Despite heavy public movement near the Collector’s office, bus stand, and market areas, no water booths or cooling arrangements have reportedly been set up. People are now questioning the administration over the lack of basic heatwave management during extreme summer conditions.
Watch this ground report from Keonjhar highlighting the severe heatwave impact, public suffering, and growing anger against administrative negligence.
